strings.ITEM_ANCIENT_SCEPTER_DESCRIPTION:
Upgrade one of your <style=cIsUtility>skills</style>. Reduce skill cooldown by <style=cIsUtility>0%</style> <style=cStack>(+30% per stack. Unique per survivor)</style>.
<style=cStack>Unusable pickups will reroll into other Legendary items.</style>
strings.ITEM_ANCIENT_SCEPTER_LORE:
Perfected energies. <He> holds it before us. The crystal of foreign elements is not attached physically, yet it does not falter from the staff's structure.

Overwhelming strength. We watch as <His> might splits the ground asunder with a single strike.

Wondrous possibilities. <His> knowledge unlocks further pathways of development. We are enlightened by <Him>.

Excellent results. From <His> hands, [Nanga] takes hold. It is as <He> said: The weak are culled.

Risking everything. The crystal destabilizies. [Nanga] is gone, and <He> is forced to wield it once again.

Power comes at a cost. <He> is willing to pay.
